ModMetaData.name: DefLoadCache
ModMetaData.author: FluxxField
ModMetaData.description:
Dramatically reduces RimWorld launch time on repeat loads by caching the results of mod XML loading and patch application.
IMPORTANT: Your first launch after installing will be slightly slower than normal. This is because the mod needs to build the cache. Every launch after that with the same mod list will be significantly faster. Don't judge the mod by the first launch.
Tested on a 414-mod load order: first launch is slightly slower than normal (~9:10) because it builds the cache. Every launch after that loads in ~2:40 (71% faster). When you change your mod list, the experimental incremental rebuild can cut rebuild time from 9 minutes to 3:29. Incremental rebuild time depends on where the changed mod sits in the load order.
Features: - Automatic cache invalidation when mods, RimWorld version, or DLLs change - Per-file fingerprinting catches any file change, even same-size content edits - Profile-aware cache management, keeps one cache per saved mod list profile - Binary XML cache format for fast deserialization on repeat launches - Skips unnecessary patch validation on cached launches - Configurable settings with per-feature toggles - Zero gameplay impact: only affects load time
Experimental (opt-in via settings): - Checkpoint-based incremental rebuild. When you add a mod or a mod updates, the game loads the nearest valid checkpoint and replays only the remaining mods instead of rebuilding everything. Works best when building up a mod list. Removing a mod or reordering still triggers a full rebuild since checkpoints carry defs from all mods present when built.
Safety: - Pre-load cache validation verifies the cache file is intact before using it - Post-load validation verifies per-mod def counts against baseline - Self-healing: bad caches are automatically deleted and rebuilt - Full fallback coverage: every entry point has error handling, the mod should never crash the game - Memory-conscious: cache files stream directly to/from disk, no large memory allocations - One-click "Test without cache" button for isolating issues - Structured log output for modders reviewing player bug reports
Requires Prepatcher by Zetrith.
